description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and clean white exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent balcony with ornate balustrades and a green floor, accessible from two large bedrooms with glass sliding doors. The ground floor has a main entry door with a set of horizontal windows above and a large window to the side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side and rear walls are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms including bedrooms and living spaces. The overall aesthetic is minimalist with a touch of classical detail in the balcony railing.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house with a prominent balcony, large windows, and minimalist design accented by ornate railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, balcony with balustrades, and large glass doors to the bedrooms.
description_view_1: Side view with a single horizontal window and a partial view of the balcony and interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid wall and minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large window and a glimpse of interior furnishings, as well as the balcony edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a modern door, horizontal windows above, and a prominent balcony with ornate balustrades
